What was good about today’s lesson?

comment
i talked a lot

Very interesting and amazing!

We discussed a lot.

I talk a lot with friends. All discussions were interesting.
We had a fun conversation.

comment
fewer person, so we finished before the time.

Nothing

I sometimes forgot English. I was helped by friends.
